headline: Tuesday 8:30 AM ET is the most concentrated single overnight risk moment of the year: CPI, five mega-bank earnings, and Fed Chair Warsh all land within 90 minutes — reduce size and know your levels before the open.
Five mega-bank earnings and a June CPI print on Tuesday make this one of the most catalyst-loaded weekends of Q3 — NDX carries the widest implied gap band at ±1.03%.
NDX carries High overnight gap risk while the real event cliff is Monday's pre-open bank earnings barrage — size positions accordingly and know your cushion lines.
FOMC minutes at 2 PM ET are the sole gap-maker tonight — NDX sits near its gamma cushion line at ~29,000 with VXN/VIX at 1.53, flagging a tech-specific vol event ahead of Thursday's open.
NDX carries the week's highest overnight gap risk as Samsung-driven chip fears collide with Wednesday's FOMC minutes — tech-specific selloff, not broad risk-off.
